docs.title: services/retrieval/README.md
docs.content:
# Retrieval Service

This directory contains the hybrid search implementation.

## HybridRetriever

`HybridRetriever` in `retriever.py` is the main entry point. It fuses pgvector ANN results with BM25 keyword results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF). The class exposes one public method: `retrieve(query: str, customer_id: str, top_k: int) -> list[Chunk]`.

## Configuration
- `TOP_K_VECTOR = 50` — candidates fetched from pgvector before RRF
- `TOP_K_BM25 = 50` — candidates fetched from BM25 before RRF
- `RRF_K = 60` — RRF rank constant

class HybridRetriever:

        customer_id: str,
        top_k: int = 20,

        ...
